## Workflow

Which maintainer workflow should this improve?

- PR review
- Issue triage
- Release management
- Documentation maintenance
- Security review
- Desktop local mode
- Provider compatibility

If this is provider-related, choose the category:

- Built-in HTTP provider
- Custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint
- Doctor-detected credential
- Local CLI agent

## Current friction

Describe what is hard to repeat, inspect, or automate today.

## Proposed command or doc

```bash
nolo run "..."
```

## Why it matters

an OSS project.
